span.p:
T04 Create L1 Requirement (7d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T05 GATE 2
L1 Requirement Approval (3d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T23 Run product final UAT (3d)
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

span.p:
T24 GATE 5
Final UAT approval (3d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T39 Monthly Product Demo (3d)
PARALLEL - Commercial
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:

A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T16 Create integration contract (3d)
A: SW Product

span.p:

A: SW Engineering

A: IoT Engineer

span.p:
T34 Support readiness (5d)
PARALLEL - Service

span.p:
NO STAGED ROLLOUT STEP
OTA lifecycle policy is Deferred -
a bad release reaches the whole fleet at once
